items.headline_en: n8n v1.123.34 Released, Tagged as Stable v1
items.summary_en: n8n v1.123.34 released on 2026-04-23 and tagged as the new stable 'v1' release. The npm package also updated to n8n@2.18.1. No release notes available in the feed.

items.headline_en: NVIDIA Releases Isaac GR00T N1.7: Open-Source Reasoning VLA Model for Humanoid Robots
items.summary_en: NVIDIA open-sourced Isaac GR00T N1.7 on Hugging Face — a vision-language-action model with built-in reasoning capabilities, designed specifically for humanoid robotics.

items.headline_en: OpenAI API Changelog: GPT Image 2 with Token-Based Pricing, Batch API 50% Off
items.summary_en: OpenAI's latest changelog adds GPT Image 2 with flexible token-based pricing, Batch API at 50% discount, WebSocket support in the Responses API, and Agents SDK updates including sandbox execution and memory management.

items.headline_en: OpenAI Offers Free ChatGPT to Verified Clinicians, Launches Workspace Agents
items.summary_en: On April 22, 2026, OpenAI announced free ChatGPT access for verified healthcare professionals, alongside the launch of Workspace Agents to support team workflows.

items.headline_en: OpenAI Codex v0.123.0 Adds Amazon Bedrock Provider and /mcp verbose Command
items.summary_en: v0.123.0 introduces a built-in Amazon Bedrock model provider with configurable AWS profile support, a new /mcp verbose command for full MCP diagnostics, and improved plugin MCP loading for background agents.

items.headline_en: last30days-skill v3.1.0 Adds X API v2 OAuth2 Backend and Competitor Auto-Discovery
items.summary_en: v3.1.0 consolidates releases v3.0.10–3.0.14, adding an xurl CLI as an alternative X search backend via OAuth2, a --competitors flag for auto-discovered comparison fan-out, configurable memory directory for Codex, @/u handle attribution in evidence lines, and improved subreddit expansion logic.

items.headline_en: MiniMax Music 2.6 Launches Cover Feature; M2.7 Agent Enables Self-Improving Models
items.summary_en: MiniMax Music 2.6 introduces the Cover feature, allowing users to remix any melody with enhanced bass and instrumentation across genres such as Pop, EDM, Trap, and more. The platform also released M2.7, a model capable of recursive self-improvement with notable gains in coding and complex office tasks including Excel, Word, and PPT workflows.
